correct_text:
1       1      1      1        80  Message-Authenticator [1]
...
0       1      0      0       145  Mobile-Node-Identifier [2]

[Note 1] This specification does not change the requirements for Message-Authenticator in all Access-* packets.  Instead, it 
requires that Message-Authenticator is present for users of this specification

[Note 2] The presence of Mobile-Node-Identifier indicates that this specification is being used.
notes:
The text for [Note 1] and [Note 2] can largely be copied from the notes in the recent errata for RFC 5090.  I didn't save a copy of that text.

This errata is mainly for implementers.  We do not expect to update this specification.
